name: realanalyst
description: Metadata-first autonomous data analysis skill suite for Codex with unified Tableau/DuckDB export.

interface.longDescription: RealAnalyst provides Codex skills for dataset registration, metadata maintenance, semantic lookup, unified Tableau/DuckDB controlled data acquisition, profiling, report writing, verification, and OSI export.
defaultPrompt: 从 RA:getting-started 开始确认数据源类型，并列出抽取元数据前需要准备的信息。
注册一个数据集并维护字段、指标和业务口径。
根据现有元数据检索指标并生成分析计划。
用 RA:data-export 从 Tableau 或 DuckDB 产出可复核分析报告所需 CSV。
